title: Immunofluorescent Image Acquisition and Quantification
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fv034","text":"This protocol describes the cultivation of rat dopaminergic N27 cells, transient transfection and immunoblottingThis protocol details the systematic acquisition and automated quantification of immunofluorescent markers (TH, mCherry, Iba1, and pSer129) in the Substantia Nigra (SN) and striatum. It utilizes a blinded workflow involving QuPath for regional delineation and CellProfiler for object and intensity quantification.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"26nf3","text":"Materials & Software","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvmj0","text":"Software:","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"677i1","text":"QuPath: For digital
      pathology and ROI annotation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dq6v5","text":"ImageJ/Fiji: For ROI format
      conversion.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"30ihq","text":"CellProfiler (v4.x/65): For
      high-throughput image analysis pipelines.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"21qju","text":"Markers:  Tyrosine Hydroxylase (TH), mCherry, Iba1, and phospho-synuclein Ser129 (pSer129).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"g0rq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bgohb","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bni7m","text":"Microscope: Olympus BX61TRF.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ekis","text":"Camera: Hamamatsu Digital Camera C13440
     ORCA-Flash 4.0.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f90in","text":"Objective: 10x.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Acquire fluorescent images of nigral and striatal sections using the Hamamatsu ORCA-Flash 4.0 camera.
Maintain consistent exposure times and gain settings across all experimental groups to allow for intensity comparisons.
Set up the Olympus BX61TRF microscope with the 10x objective.
Import the raw 10x images into QuPath .
Manually delineate the Regions of Interest (ROIs) for the Substantia Nigra (SN) and striatum .
Export the defined ROIs into ImageJ to ensure compatibility with the downstream analysis pipeline.
Import images and corresponding ROIs into CellProfiler .
Run built-in-house pipelines to identify objects based on:
Blinding: Ensure investigators are blinded to the experimental conditions (genotype/treatment) before starting the analysis.
name of built-in-house pipelines: Transd.eff.cpproj, TH_IBA1_PSYN_SN.cpproj, TH_IBA1_PSYN_STR.cpproj
Total Cell Count: Quantify the number of objects (e.g., TH+ or Iba1+ cells).
Pixel Density/Intensity: Quantify marker intensity per area (mm2).
Calculate the cell counts or intensity values for each individual section.
Normalize counts to the area of the ROI (counts/mm2).
Average the values from all sections belonging to a single sample to generate a final representative value per subject.
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
